comments:
Description: The deck was fun, but as always you need the right meta and a good seating to be succesful with it. It is no magical wonder deck.

Antonio is strong with his unlock in the discard after a succesful pol. act. Francisco and Alvaro are very good too with their plus bleed. In the 1 vs 1 battles for the game win the bleeds often were decisive. So the question is wether you swap out a Antonio for one of them.
I planned to play with 5 Monçadas but did not find a fifth copy in my heap. As you really need him in your starting four you should go with 5 copies in 13 cards.

My stealth package was fine in that meta, probably need more stealth in other metas

cards.comments: never played it, could have twice but it was not the right time. Still a very strong card imho
cards.name: Fear of Mekhet

cards.comments: had it only in the final, the deck ran smoothly without. An autoinclude thinking about all the blood intensive cards like Deflection, Govern, Obt-stealth, Villein, though I did not miss it. Could be a Monastery of Shadows probably
cards.name: Gurchon Hall

cards.comments: useful also in the later stages of game to cycle Unholy Sacraments, three on, three back
cards.name: Information Highway

cards.comments: autoinclude
cards.name: Power Structure

cards.comments: I like that card, though it wasn't needed in the prelims. a good addition beside Power Structure
cards.name: Powerbase: Madrid

cards.comments: not bad, especially if you get it early. Great there is no pool cost
cards.name: Privileged Position

cards.comments: was the gamechanging and probably the winning card in the finals, but you have to look out for fighty sabbats, then it is not playable
cards.name: Regent

cards.comments: Villein 5, play Unholy Sacrament ;)
cards.name: Villein

cards.comments: quite right imho, enough to speed up the second minion, great to bleed in late game
cards.name: Govern the Unaligned

cards.comments: could be two, so strong
cards.name: Banishment

cards.comments: strong, good for negotiations or powerful if you have vote lock, there are sooo many locations these days
cards.name: Cold War

cards.comments: very, very strong when prey and maybe pred plays 8 cap plus, had surprisingly four preys who did not, glad I cut to four
cards.name: Empires Fall

cards.comments: good card, strong early, nice to have later
cards.name: War of Ages

cards.comments: great for the decisive strike, good with Monçada special
cards.name: Blanket of Night

cards.comments: a good versatile mix of Shroud of Night and Seduction, flexibility is always nice, beware, Gratiano can only play it on inferior
cards.name: Dominant Personality

cards.comments: great card, imho better than Amici Noctis,can speed up influence, goes well with getting back pool via Info Highway, you don't need a referendum to pass with many votes, just pass = gain benefit
cards.name: Magnetic Authority

cards.comments: political action and this means the magical 3 stealth to pass Second Tradition or two ORs
cards.name: Shadow Play

cards.comments: for a probable third intercept or to go for a bleed without much danger
cards.name: Shroud of Absence

cards.comments: good vs. Unmasking ally blockers
cards.name: Unthinkable Humiliation

cards.comments: good for a key referendum, did not need it
cards.name: Ominous Chorus

cards.comments: was a good number, not enough against a dedicated bleeder, then backoust ;)
cards.name: Deflection

cards.comments: rather not many, deck dies to dedicated rush, but then no combat ends help, right? Was good vs. Assault rifle Anarchs or is good vs. a Behemoth or War Ghoul
cards.name: Shadow Body

name: Lasombra Path of Power v2
